features.evidence: It's not a luxury laptop—it’s a focused, performance-driven tool for gaming and heavy workloads. Bottom line: if you’re a gamer who prioritizes performance and value, this is a fantastic machine for the price.

The RGB keyboard looks great, The function keys are well thought out (function keys for screen brightness, keyboard backlighting brightness, enable/disable touchpad, mute mic, etc.), which I find to be rare with laptops.

As someone who’s been building and using gaming PCs for years, I picked up the MSI Katana 15 HX B14WGK-016US primarily for portability without compromising performance—and I’m impressed with what this system delivers. The laptop runs Windows 11 well and seems very fast and powerful (although I haven’t done anything
Bottom line: if you’re a gamer who prioritizes performance and value, this is a fantastic machine for the price. I consider the price I paid ($1746) reasonable compared with similar laptops,

The function keys are well thought out (function keys for screen brightness, keyboard backlighting brightness, enable/disable touchpad, mute mic, etc.), which I find to be rare with laptops. The 165Hz display really helps the experience feel fluid in competitive titles.

MSI did a solid job with thermals—kick on Cooler Boost and it stays cool enough without thermal throttling. again, I advise a cooling pad with fans to ensure you don’t overheat it during any use more intensive than watching videos.
I didn’t pick this laptop for its light weight design. metal feel and pretty basic clean design,
I wanted a new laptop for personal use as well as mostly moderate gaming, and this laptop is great for all my purposes (i9, 32GB RAM, 1TB storage).
The function keys are well thought out (function keys for screen brightness, keyboard backlighting brightness, enable/disable touchpad, mute mic, etc.), which I find to be rare with laptops.
Battery life isn’t great—maybe 4 hours max under light use, and much less if you’re doing anything demanding.
value: average battery life in hours: 2 Hours
